data.body: ddbe held-out TDD: authored 14 tests (3 happy-path in tests/unit/test_identity_ddbe.py; 11 held-out edge/exemption/resolver-fallback/E2E). Confirmed ALL 14 RED for right reasons (create_identity missing, identity not in TicketType, not in EXCLUDED_SYNC_TYPES). Fixed one test-bug (reconciler import path -> importlib file-load due to _engine.py shadowing _engine/ dir). Held-out oracle moved OUT of tree to job tmp. Dispatching implementer subagent with happy-path only.
